---
title: "Tianyi Yuan Portfolio"
---

::: {.hero}
# Tianyi Yuan

### Business Analytics Student | Data Analysis | AI & Labor Market Insights

Welcome to my academic portfolio. This site highlights my interests in business analytics, data-driven decision-making, and the application of artificial intelligence in real-world business problems.
:::

## Featured Project

::: {.project-card}
### AI Job Market Analysis

This project examines the geographic distribution of AI-related job postings across metropolitan areas in the United States.

The analysis compares traditional technology hubs with other locations to understand whether AI-related opportunities are concentrated in a few major cities or more broadly distributed across regions.

**Key Finding:**  
AI-related jobs remain strong in major tech hubs, but a larger share of postings is found outside these hubs when considering the overall distribution.

**Skills Used:**  
Data analysis, geographic comparison, labor market analytics, visualization, business interpretation.
:::

## Portfolio Focus

::: {.grid}
::: {.box}
### Data Analysis
Using data to identify patterns, trends, and business insights.
:::

::: {.box}
### Business Analytics
Connecting technical results with business decisions and career implications.
:::

::: {.box}
### AI Applications
Exploring how AI affects labor markets, industries, and job opportunities.
:::
:::
